monitor_the_situation.title: US Launches Three Nights of Strikes on Iran

— S4 · Conflict · Tehran, Iran · 21h ago. President Trump confirms US forces conducted three consecutive nights of airstrikes on Iran in response to attacks on commercial shipping, marking a major escalation.

CMA CGM Ship Hit by Missile in Strait of Hormuz May Be Scrapped
— S3 · Conflict · Strait of Hormuz · 1h ago. A CMA CGM container ship, previously struck by a missile in the Strait of Hormuz, may be scrapped due to extensive damage, according to the CEO.
